---
title: shiny
---

```{css css_custom, code=readLines("_css_custom.css"), echo=FALSE}
```
```{r knitr_config, code=readLines("_knitr_config.R"), echo=FALSE}
```

*********************************************************************

## widgets

*********************************************************************

## run from github

```
shiny::runGitHub
```

*********************************************************************

## css styling

selector | description
------------- | -------------
.selectize-input | 
.selectize-output | 
.shiny-plot-output | 
.shiny-text-output | 

```
.selectize-input { font-size: 32px; line-height: 32px;} 
.selectize-dropdown { font-size: 28px; line-height: 28px; }
.shiny-plot-output{ height:100vh !important;}
shiny-text-output {background-color:#fff;}
```
